summary: Completed the 6-phase pure structural refactor of modules/home/: split email/agent-tools.nix (761 lines) into a 7-file agent-tools/ directory, merged packages/{fonts,lean-math,ai-tools}.nix into packages/misc.nix, co-located the memory system into memory/{monitor,services}.nix, and renamed core/shell.nix to core/dotfiles.nix. Updated modules/home/default.nix (31 -> 29 entries) for every path change. Final nix build succeeded and nix store diff-closures against the Phase 1 baseline was EMPTY, confirming zero closure/behavior change.

artifacts.summary: Shared pure-string helpers (manifestDirDefault, mkPreamble, mkMutationPreamble, lower) extracted from the former monolithic agent-tools.nix; plain non-module Nix file
email-census binary (read-only sender/folder/date census), split from agent-tools.nix
email-classify binary (local-tags-only classification + candidate manifest), split from agent-tools.nix
email-unsubscribe-extract binary (read-only List-Unsubscribe header harvest), split from agent-tools.nix
email-archive-confirmed mutation binary, split from agent-tools.nix
email-delete-confirmed two-hop mutation binary, split from agent-tools.nix
Aggregator listing the five agent-tools per-binary modules
Merge of packages/{fonts,lean-math,ai-tools}.nix with disambiguating header comment against top-level misc.nix
One-line disambiguating header comment added (sanctioned Non-Goals touch); no logic change
Renamed from scripts/memory-monitor.nix via git mv (content unchanged)
Renamed from services/memory-services.nix via git mv (content unchanged)
Renamed from core/shell.nix via git mv, header reworded to fix the misnomer
Aggregator updated for every path change; 31 -> 29 import entries
Implementation summary with full verification results and plan deviations

completion_data.completion_summary: Completed a pure structural refactor of modules/home/: split the 761-line email/agent-tools.nix into a 7-file directory, merged three tiny package fragments into packages/misc.nix, co-located the memory system into memory/, and renamed core/shell.nix to core/dotfiles.nix, updating the modules/home/default.nix aggregator (31 -> 29 entries) throughout. Verified with an empty nix store diff-closures against a pre-change baseline, confirming zero behavior change.

next_steps: None required. Task 91 (documentation_sync_reorg_final) will separately update the stale README.md/docs/* references to email/agent-tools.nix, core/shell.nix, etc. that this task intentionally left untouched.
